payoutBreakdown.formula: min(base hourly earning × disruption hours × trigger multiplier, weekly payout cap)
payoutBreakdown.explanation: We started with ₹246 of estimated lost earnings, applied a 1.02 severity multiplier for curfew, then respected the weekly payout cap of ₹1200.
